name: Rapid Reconnaissance Command Burst
description: Detects 3+ reconnaissance commands executed on the same host within 60 seconds, consistent with automated C2 post-exploitation enumeration (Fawkes ps/whoami/net-enum sequence).
query:
sequence by host.name with maxspan=60s
  [process where event.code == "1" and
    process.name in ("whoami.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "ipconfig.exe",
                     "systeminfo.exe", "tasklist.exe", "nltest.exe",
                     "netstat.exe", "arp.exe", "nslookup.exe")]
  [process where event.code == "1" and
    process.name in ("whoami.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "ipconfig.exe",
                     "systeminfo.exe", "tasklist.exe", "nltest.exe",
                     "netstat.exe", "arp.exe", "nslookup.exe")]
  [process where event.code == "1" and
    process.name in ("whoami.exe", "net.exe", "net1.exe", "ipconfig.exe",
                     "systeminfo.exe", "tasklist.exe", "nltest.exe",
                     "netstat.exe", "arp.exe", "nslookup.exe")]
